mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT sor.operator_id FROM sys_role_menu rm INNER JOIN sys_operator_role sor ON sor.role_id = rm.role_id WHERE rm.menu_id = #{menuId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_role_menu (role_id, menu_id, created_by, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.roleId}, #{item.menuId}, #{item.createdBy}, #{item.createdAt})
